description: Fallback local Ollama comparison if Gemma 4 12B is not viable: Gemma 4 e4b vs Qwen3.6 27B on maintenance_value sparse and contract-visible lanes.

models.notes: Smallest configured Gemma 4 model. Baseline local iteration row.
Fallback if gemma4:12b is not viable. Ollama lists qwen3.6:27b as the smallest Qwen3.6 tag; this is a role-equivalent fallback, not a size-equivalent replacement for Gemma 4 12B.
